name: code-quality
description: Claude Code plugin for code auditing (security, cost, performance, cleanup), config refinement, and jCodeMunch project indexing.

commands.name: audit
commands.description: Security, cost, performance, and cleanup code audit

commands.name: refine
commands.description: Refine CLAUDE.md, SKILL.md, settings, and hooks

commands.name: memory-prune
commands.description: Scan ~/.claude/projects/ memory files — list stale/unused entries, prompt to delete or keep
